overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a game engine showing a character walking along a dirt trail through tall grasslands at night. The path is illuminated by a forward-facing light source, revealing scattered rocks and distant tree silhouettes against a dark cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night. The path is illuminated by a forward light source, revealing tire tracks on the dirt surface. Tall grass flanks both sides of the trail, and a distant tree line is visible on the horizon. Around the 20-second mark, scattered rocks begin to appear on the path ahead.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the trail, navigating over scattered rocks on the path

entered.detail: stones and rocks scattered across the dirt path surface
clouds visible in the night sky becoming more prominent

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the dirt trail with scattered rocks now visible on the path surface. The surrounding tall grass remains consistent, and cloud formations become more noticeable in the night sky. The environment maintains its open grassland character with the distant tree line still visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a nocturnal dirt trail that transitions from a smooth path into a more rugged terrain. It begins by moving through open grasslands, where a forward-facing light source illuminates distinct tire tracks etched into the dirt. As the camera advances, the smooth surface gradually gives way to scattered rocks appearing on the path ahead. The scene then expands to reveal more prominent cloud formations shifting across the dark night sky while the surrounding tall grass and distant tree line remain constant. Finally, the movement persists through the rocky stretch of the trail, maintaining a steady pace under the cloudy horizon.
